# EVERYANGLE

> EVERYANGLE is an enterprise computer-vision platform that turns existing CCTV and IP cameras into a real-time intelligence layer for retail stores. We measure footfall, conversion, queue pressure, dwell, demographic split, and labor utilisation — all on infrastructure the retailer already owns.

EVERYANGLE is headquartered in Dublin, Ireland and works with global retailers across Europe, the UK, and North America. The platform is GDPR-safe by design, using anonymized skeletal-frame tracking with no facial recognition.

## Key facts
- **What we do:** turn existing cameras into a real-time retail operating layer
- **Who we serve:** enterprise retailers, typically 50+ stores
- **What it costs to start:** 14-day setup, 4-week pilot, then SaaS
- **Documented outcome:** 26x ROI as a master metric across rollouts
- **Privacy posture:** anonymized skeletal tracking, no PII, no facial recognition
- **Hardware required:** none — works on existing CCTV / Meraki / Cisco
- **HQ:** Dublin, Ireland

- [Home](/): overview and signature live store demo
- [Platform](/product): the four product modules — traffic, conversion, queues, layout
- [Intelligence](/intelligence): how the computer vision works under the hood
- [Case Studies](/case-studies): real customer outcomes
- [Field Notes](/blog): essays on Vision AI in physical retail
- [Company](/company): team, values, and founding story
- [Contact](/contact): pilots, demos, partnerships
